title: Read-Only Incremental Snapshot
description: Read-replica use cases: performing incremental snapshots without locking the primary database, driven by GTID watermarks.

actors.name: ReadReplicaDatabase
actors.description: MySQL/MariaDB read replica; source of binlog events and GTID set queries. No locks acquired.

actors.name: BinlogSourceTask
actors.description: Abstract task entry point (extends BaseSourceTask). Validates snapshot feasibility and binlog configuration (ROW format, FULL row image). Initiates processing pipeline.

actors.name: Operator
actors.description: Sends signals (via signal table/topic) to add/stop data collections for incremental snapshot.

use_cases.name: Configure Read-Only Connection
use_cases.description: Set read.only=true in BinlogConnectorConfig. BinlogConnectorConfig.READ_ONLY_CONNECTION field (Boolean, default false). Exposed via isReadOnlyConnection().

use_cases.name: Validate Snapshot Feasibility
use_cases.description: BinlogSourceTask.validateSnapshotFeasibility(snapshotter, offsetContext, connection): checks snapshotter.shouldSnapshotData(), inspects earliest binlog filename for purge warnings.

use_cases.name: Validate Binlog Configuration
use_cases.description: BinlogSourceTask.validateBinlogConfiguration(snapshotter, connection): if shouldStream(), verifies isBinlogFormatRow() and isBinlogRowImageFull() on connection.

use_cases.name: Resolve Snapshot Strategy (No Lock)
use_cases.description: SnapshotterService bundles Snapshotter + SnapshotQuery + SnapshotLock. For read-only mode, SnapshotLock is NoneSnapshotLock: tableLockingStatement() returns Optional.empty() — no DDL lock issued on the primary.

use_cases.name: Add Data Collections to Snapshot
use_cases.description: Signal triggers addDataCollectionNamesToSnapshot(SignalPayload, SnapshotConfiguration). Reads additionalData from signal payload, delegates to AbstractIncrementalSnapshotChangeEventSource.

use_cases.name: Process Binlog Message (Update Window)
use_cases.description: processMessage(partition, dataCollectionId, key, offsetContext): calls context.updateWindowState(offsetContext). If window closes → sendWindowEvents + readChunk. Else if window non-empty and deduplication needed → deduplicateWindow.

use_cases.name: Process Heartbeat Event
use_cases.description: processHeartbeat(partition, offsetContext): calls readUntilGtidChange — loops while snapshotRunning and reachedHighWatermark(currentGtid), closing window and reading chunks.

use_cases.name: Process Filtered / Transaction Events
use_cases.description: processFilteredEvent and processTransactionStartedEvent both call updateWindowState; if closed → sendWindowEvents + readChunk. processTransactionCommittedEvent calls readUntilGtidChange.

use_cases.name: Track GTID Watermarks
use_cases.description: On window open: emitWindowOpen → updateLowWatermark → getExecutedGtidSet(context::setLowWatermark). On window close: emitWindowClose → updateHighWatermark → getExecutedGtidSet(context::setHighWatermark). Abstract method getExecutedGtidSet(Consumer<GtidSet>) implemented by concrete subclass.

use_cases.name: Re-read Chunk on Server Identity Change
use_cases.description: In emitWindowClose: if context.hasServerIdentifierChanged() → rereadChunk(partition, offsetContext). Guards against server failover mid-snapshot.

use_cases.name: Stop Snapshot
use_cases.description: Signal triggers requestStopSnapshot(partition, offsetContext, additionalData, dataCollectionIds), delegates to parent AbstractIncrementalSnapshotChangeEventSource.

use_cases.name: Manage Snapshot Context State
use_cases.description: BinlogReadOnlyIncrementalSnapshotContext stores GTID watermarks, window state in offsets. Key operations: setLowWatermark(GtidSet), setHighWatermark(GtidSet), reachedHighWatermark(String), updateWindowState(OffsetContext), closeWindow(), watermarksChanged(), hasServerIdentifierChanged(), getCurrentGtid(OffsetContext).

key_relationships: BinlogReadOnlyIncrementalSnapshotContext reads GTID_KEY from BinlogSourceInfo (via OffsetContext.getSourceInfo())
BinlogSourceTask extends BaseSourceTask; validates via Snapshotter + BinlogConnectorConnection
SnapshotterService composes Snapshotter + SnapshotQuery + SnapshotLock (immutable, thread-safe)
NoneSnapshotLock implements SnapshotLock; tableLockingStatement returns Optional.empty() — no lock on primary
important_notes: No table locks: NoneSnapshotLock.tableLockingStatement() returns Optional.empty(). Primary is never locked.
GTID-based windowing: low watermark captured at window open, high watermark at window close. readUntilGtidChange loops until high watermark reached.
Server identity guard: if GTID server ID changes mid-snapshot (replica failover), emitWindowClose triggers rereadChunk to ensure consistency.
Abstract design: BinlogReadOnlyIncrementalSnapshotChangeEventSource is abstract; getExecutedGtidSet(Consumer<GtidSet>) is implemented by MySQL/MariaDB subclasses.
BinlogConnectorConfig.READ_ONLY_CONNECTION field ('read.only', boolean, default=false) enables read-only replica mode.
Signal-driven: addDataCollectionNamesToSnapshot and requestStopSnapshot are invoked via signal payloads (not direct API calls).
SnapshotterService is @ThreadSafe and @Immutable for all three components (Snapshotter, SnapshotQuery, SnapshotLock).
